name: Campaign Command 2.0
description: Professional command centre for tabletop RPG and wargame campaigns. Supports D&D 5e, Pathfinder 2e, Warhammer 40K, AoS, Necromunda, Kill Team and custom systems.
author: Adeptus Craftmatica
_note_optional_deps: If campaign_tracker (v1) is loaded, its campaign_service is shared. If not, v2 creates its own. Both plugins should not run simultaneously with separate service instances against the same database.
